name: lang-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at Language, the flagship journal of the Linguistic Society of America (LSA), published by Cambridge University Press.

plugins.name: lang-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Language (Linguistic Society of America) manuscript lifecycle — Cambridge University Press ScholarOne submission, double-anonymous review, the 18,000-word General Research Article cap, the Perspectives target-article format, Leipzig-convention interlinear glossing, and the Language Style Sheet.
